title: Snowy Shepherd House Fix
description: Fixes snowy shepherd houses not generating
body:
This data pack simply brings a fix to [MC-170550](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-170550), a bug in which the sheperd's house in snowy villages never generate at all, due to a typo in one of the jigsaw configurations within the file.

For a bit of proof that the fix works:
1. Create a snowy plains buffet world with the seed `-3230519642001848764`
2. Teleport to `580 ~ 328`. With the data pack, the shepherd house should generate there. The comparison is shown below.

![comparison image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k7nhl0Dp/images/21ecf5a46f8d9a683999f36cdb1996a220a50c9a.png)
